data.body: PHASE 1-2 DONE (committed 19d3985d). Built faithful E2E tier (tests/e2e/) driving REAL bpmn-io libs via Node harness (bpmn-moddle + bpmn-auto-layout, esbuild-bundled, self-skipping). Reproduced the Save rejection (RED) then FIXED the root cause in bpmn.py: '@' arm ids are illegal BPMN NCNames -> real parser drops the arms. Now emit '.'-separated ids + <rebar:Config _role> marker; reconstruct arms structurally (gateway flow + role marker), robust to bpmn-js id rewrites. 5 e2e + 2 new unit guards green; full workflow unit suite (217) green. NEXT: front-end UX — bpmn-auto-layout on open + bpmn-js-properties-panel for view/edit.
